name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ame

classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Ame SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Ame SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-ame
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common ame
```

压缩说明：
a) 上报的json格式字符串通过流的转换（ByteArrayInputStream, java.util.zip.GZIPOutputStream），获取到压缩后的字节数组。
b) 将压缩后的字节数组转成16进制字符串。

reportData由两部分数据组成：
